name: jupi-skills
description: Agent Skills for capturing and surfacing team decisions with Jupi — search, log, and submit decisions from inside Claude Code, Cowork, and Cursor.

plugins.name: jupi-skills
plugins.description: Decision skills backed by the Jupi MCP: search-decisions (find prior decisions), log-decision (record a settled call), submit-decision (hand an open call to a decider).
